title: ononis monophylla subsp. tuna
intro: Ononis monophylla subsp. tuna is a subspecies of the Ononis monophylla plant, a perennial species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating urinary tract issues, and acting as a natural anti-arthritic agent. Ononis monophylla subsp. tuna is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
